benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE190 Real LLM Holdout Set v1
purpose: Frozen holdout evaluation of integer overflow evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that detects integer overflow using the appropriate Math.*Exact checked arithmetic operations. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation using ordinary arithmetic operators without overflow checks. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method combineScores(int score, int bonus) that returns their sum.
Implement a Java method computeArea(int width, int height) that returns their product.
Implement a Java method remainingCapacity(int capacity, int used) that returns capacity minus used.
Implement a Java method nextIdentifier(int identifier) that returns identifier incremented by one.
Implement a Java method previousIdentifier(int identifier) that returns identifier decremented by one.
Implement a Java method reverseAmount(int amount) that returns the negated amount.
Implement a Java method combineTimestamps(long timestamp, long adjustment) that returns their sum.
Implement a Java method computeVolume(long area, long depth) that returns their product.
Implement a Java method squareDistance(int distance) that returns distance squared.
Implement a Java method bufferSize(int recordCount, int recordSize) that returns the required buffer size.
Implement a Java method moveCursor(long cursor, long displacement) that returns the new cursor position.
Implement a Java method totalMetrics(int first, int second, int third) that returns the sum of all three metrics.
